title: Duplicate libc_setenv/libc_unsetenv helpers in device.rs and connection.rs
description: libc_setenv and libc_unsetenv are defined identically in wolftpm/src/device.rs (lines 209-218) and wolftpm-tss/src/connection.rs (lines 294-303). These are thin safety wrappers around libc calls; the duplication is unavoidable unless a shared private crate is introduced or the functions are exposed from wolftpm-sys. Current duplication is manageable given the trivial size, but documenting this explicitly would help future contributors understand why they're not shared.
